subcodes.first_line: The Cause hath appeared from the Most Great Horizon through this Name, whereby the horizon of utterance was illumined and gave voice [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد ظهر الامر فی المنظر الاکبر بهذا الاسم الذی به انار افق البیان و نطقت
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
